scheduled_maintenance.title: Partner Carrier Activity - Maintenance of Network Infrastructure (GNOC-11776)
scheduled_maintenance.description: Our Partner Carrier will be doing maintenance on its database infrastructure as part of an initiative to improve network resiliency and efficiency. This work aligns with our commitment to providing best-in-class services with Semtech.Impact: As part of our upcoming network optimization activities, there may be very minor intermittent connectivity issues during the planned window. Some devices could experience brief, momentary disconnections, but network access is expected to restore automatically without any delay.Additional Information:  Semtech engineers will be actively monitoring the network throughout the maintenance activity. Notifications will be sent prior to the start of the work and upon completion.

scheduled_maintenance.title: Semtech Planned Activity – AMM05 Upgrade to version 2.18 Re-Release (API Key Support) (GNOC-11464)
scheduled_maintenance.description: This notice is to inform you that Semtech will be performing scheduled maintenance to upgrade AMM05 to version 2.18 Re-Release (API Key Support). This release introduces several new features and enhancements.Impact:- The AMM web User Interface will be unavailable during the maintenance window.- Gateway operation will be unaffected during this change window.- Please confirm with your IT team if your firewall restricts access by IP address. There will be no change to the instance's FQDN. All gateways should be configured to use the server FQDN.- In case a gateway running supported firmware and configuration stops checking in after the upgrade, please reboot the gateway and troubleshoot prior to opening a new support case. Other Information:The Global NOC and Semtech Engineers will actively monitor the network during the maintenance.  Notifications will be sent prior to the start and upon completion of the maintenance window.

scheduled_maintenance.title: Planned Partner Carrier Activity - Network Infrastructure Maintenance (GNOC-11829)
scheduled_maintenance.description: Our Partner Carrier will conduct a planned Network Infrastructure Maintenance in the United States Data centers. This maintenance activity may cause temporary disturbances or delays in SMS in the US region only.  Measures have been taken to minimize the impact on customer experience.Impact: During this activity, there is a possibility for intermittent disruptions in SMS traffic and processing that may occur during maintenance.Additional Information: The Global NOC will be actively monitoring the network during the maintenance activity.  Notifications will be sent before and after the completion of the maintenance.

scheduled_maintenance.title: Semtech Planned Activity – Software upgrade on Router Infrastructure in Europe Data Centers (GNOC-11699)
scheduled_maintenance.description: Semtech will be doing maintenance of software upgrade on its routers in Europe Data Centers as part of an initiative to improve network resiliency and efficiency. This work aligns with our commitment to providing best-in-class services with Semtech.Impact: During the maintenance window, customers may experience service disruptions in Europe region only. Affected devices may experience degradation or interruptions in SMS, Voice, and Data services and network connectivity briefly.Additional Information:  Semtech engineers will be actively monitoring the network throughout the maintenance activity. Notifications will be sent prior to the start of the work and upon completion.
